steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The simplified expression is $16x+240$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. The expression $16\left(x+15\right)$ can be rewritten as $16\left(x\right)+16\left(15\right)$, which is equivalent to $16x+240$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
